use_cases: FAQ sections where users expand/collapse answers
Navigation menus with nested expandable items
Content sections that reveal detailed information on demand
Settings panels with collapsible option groups
Dashboard interfaces with expandable data sections
ai_summary: A flexible collapsible/accordion component with multiple styling variants built on Radix UI primitives. Supports primary, mono, destructive, secondary, outline, dashed, ghost, dim, and other visual styles through CVA configuration. Features chevron indicators and open/closed state styling for clear visual feedback during content expansion.
